text:
[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Its fun"}]},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gunplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Gunplay is fine"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "content is there"}, {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "technically it’s no longer on life support"}, {"aspect": "specialists", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Specialists never really clicked for me"}, {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Matches feel chaotic in a weird way, not the good Battlefield kind"}, {"aspect": "atmosphere", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "No classic Battlefield soul"}]},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Do not buy this game if you don't want to turn on secure boot on your system"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "CSM ... destroys your performance"}, {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "trying to turn on secure boot has the risk of bricking your entire system"}, {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "EA's stupid decisions"}, {"aspect": "anti-cheat", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it does literally nothing to prevent cheating"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "good but eventually boring"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "very fun building up your tavern and managing the customers and stock levels"}, {"aspect": "progression", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "didn't expand on the very basic setup"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "after 7 hours ... just an afk simulator"}, {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "no real interest in playing though a second time"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "very tedious quest system"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "probably still worth the price if its on a discount"}]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "nice music"}, {"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "really relaxing game"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "relaxing game"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Very Addicting"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "This game was fun"}, {"aspect": "quest_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "research and quest aspects to be broken"}, {"aspect": "progression", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Many of the researches were very so-so"}, {"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "confusing"}, {"aspect": "grind", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "it was a grind"}, {"aspect": "balance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "they wanted a balanced game and it sort of isn't"}, {"aspect": "building", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "everything can snap into place"}]},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": [{"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the villians are incredibly shallow"}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "sexual assault bad = standard take"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Morgana never stops being a creep"}]},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": [{"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the music is fire"}, {"aspect": "story", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the story is great"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the characters are memorable"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the gameplay is good"}]},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [{"aspect": "pacing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Slow start"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "becomes one of the best games you will ever play"}, {"aspect": "emotional_impact", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Finishing the game feels like a true end of an era"}]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": [{"aspect": "music", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The soundtrack is phenomenal"}]},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "freedom to go to any planet"}, {"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "reset myself in a different universe all together"}, {"aspect": "characters", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "romance my companions"}, {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "fly any ship I want"}]},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "This game has come a long way"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "loading screens"}]},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "gotten better over the years and since the last DLC and patch"}]},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": [{"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "full of procedurally generated crap"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "soulless randomly generated nothing"}]}
]

  {"idx": 12, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [{"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "constant pop up errors, horrible lag, crashing, freezing"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "horrible lag"}, {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "game outright REFUSING to load maps or turn on/off mods"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "$32 of cash down the drain"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "$32 more expensive than it should be"}]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [{"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you can play the game multiple different ways (Merc, Trader, Vassel, Ruler)"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The world, for the most part, moves pretty consistantly and things constantly change"}, {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Battles can be fun and do require some thinking"}, {"aspect": "sieges", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Seiges are a great feature, you just lack the ability to control them well"}, {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Dialouges are rough and uninteresting, every NPC interaction is identical and repetitive"}, {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "AI lords and leaders are terrible when it comes to tactics"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Graphics are very poor"}, {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Hideouts are bland and monotonous"}, {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you will absolutely need mods as the base systems and features just arent there"}]},
